title: Conduct a safety audit
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct a safety audit demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Perform audit planning

pcs.text: Identify objectives, scope and focus of audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify objectives, scope and focus of audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify objectives, scope and focus of audit.

pcs.text: Identify audit target and required documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify audit target and required documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify audit target and required documentation.

pcs.text: Determine audit process and sampling technique
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine audit process and sampling technique?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine audit process and sampling technique.

pcs.text: Plan frequency and scheduling of audit events
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan frequency and scheduling of audit events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan frequency and scheduling of audit events.

pcs.text: Prepare audit documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare audit documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare audit documentation.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-audit communications with client and relevant stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-audit communications with client and relevant stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-audit communications with client and relevant stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Perform audit planning

elements.title: Undertake safety audit activities

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Conduct planned audit of personal protective equipment used on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct planned audit of personal protective equipment used on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct planned audit of personal protective equipment used on site.

pcs.text: Conduct planned audit of tools and equipment for defective components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct planned audit of tools and equipment for defective components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct planned audit of tools and equipment for defective components.

pcs.text: Conduct planned audit inspection of emergency and rescue procedures, practices and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct planned audit inspection of emergency and rescue procedures, practices and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct planned audit inspection of emergency and rescue procedures, practices and equipment.

pcs.text: Conduct planned audit inspection of height safety procedures, practices  and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct planned audit inspection of height safety procedures, practices  and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct planned audit inspection of height safety procedures, practices  and equipment.

pcs.text: Conduct planned audit inspection of workplace safety documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct planned audit inspection of workplace safety documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct planned audit inspection of workplace safety documentation.

pcs.text: Confirm currency of licencing requirements of individuals in work team for specialised work functions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm currency of licencing requirements of individuals in work team for specialised work functions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm currency of licencing requirements of individuals in work team for specialised work functions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake safety audit activities

elements.title: Identify and respond to non-conformance

pcs.text: Assess safety audit outcomes against compliance to safety policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess safety audit outcomes against compliance to safety policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess safety audit outcomes against compliance to safety policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Identify non-conformance with safety policies, procedures, manufacturer instructions and applicable industry standards

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-conformance with safety policies, procedures, manufacturer instructions and applicable industry standards.

pcs.text: Identify and detect faults, levels of wear and damage in equipment and determine remedial action

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and detect faults, levels of wear and damage in equipment and determine remedial action.

pcs.text: Issue rectification notices for breaches in work health and safety policies, procedures and practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Issue rectification notices for breaches in work health and safety policies, procedures and practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Issue rectification notices for breaches in work health and safety policies, procedures and practices.

pcs.text: Remove unsafe tools and equipment from service and tag according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove unsafe tools and equipment from service and tag according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove unsafe tools and equipment from service and tag according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Recommend training to improve safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend training to improve safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend training to improve safety.

elements.title: Record, report and present audit results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review safety audit outcomes against workplace policies, procedures and industry safety standards.

pcs.text: Identify and record inconsistencies in safe work practices, and recommend action for approval according to workplace safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record inconsistencies in safe work practices, and recommend action for approval according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Make recommendations to resolve unsafe work practices according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make recommendations to resolve unsafe work practices according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make recommendations to resolve unsafe work practices according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report results of safety audit according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report results of safety audit according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain equipment data and audit inspection records according to industry standards and workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain equipment data and audit inspection records according to industry standards and workplace requirements.
